judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content categories (a hand-drawn sketch map, a trajectory/altitude diagram, a data table) and their general subject matter, but Description B provides numerous specific quoted labels and text inside the images that Description A omits or only partially mentions, without direct contradiction on those quoted specifics.
original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch map and profile diagram showing an "atmospheric disturbance" flight path over a coastal area in Alaska.

A hand-drawn map of a coastal region showing islands, bays, and an airport. A thick black line with arrows indicates a flight path moving from right to left (east to west). Key locations are labeled, and a table of data is included on the left side.
A hand-drawn side-view diagram showing altitude and trajectory. The horizontal axis is not labeled. The vertical axis shows altitude in feet.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Photostatic copy of a hand-drawn map/diagram with handwritten annotations and arrows, showing a plotted flight path or trajectory over a river and bay area; includes a boxed “Data” note, a small “possible error (maximum)” trajectory graph, a north arrow, and the printed word “CONFIDENTIAL” at upper left.*
